raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is directly reachable by the right arm and the zone in front of the cup is free of obstacles so that it can be slid forward without colliding with the boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is pushed ~15 cm forward, clearing the workspace in front of both boxes and no longer constraining access to them."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With the cup moved away, the left side of box_1 is accessible and there is free space on the table to slide the box slightly to the left, breaking the light adhesive attachment to box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is shifted a few centimeters leftward and is no longer attached to box_2, creating a clear gap for dual-arm access."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is detached from box_2, sufficient clearance exists around it, and both arms can approach the box’s lateral faces simultaneously.",
    "Postcondition": "The robot securely holds box_1 with both arms and lifts it approximately 5 cm above the tabletop, completing the ‘pick up the darker box’ task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is directly reachable by the right arm and the zone in front of the cup is free of obstacles so that it can be slid forward without colliding with the boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is pushed ~15 cm forward, clearing the workspace in front of both boxes and no longer constraining access to them.

parsed_json.Precondition: With the cup moved away, the left side of box_1 is accessible and there is free space on the table to slide the box slightly to the left, breaking the light adhesive attachment to box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is shifted a few centimeters leftward and is no longer attached to box_2, creating a clear gap for dual-arm access.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is detached from box_2, sufficient clearance exists around it, and both arms can approach the box’s lateral faces simultaneously.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The robot securely holds box_1 with both arms and lifts it approximately 5 cm above the tabletop, completing the ‘pick up the darker box’ task.
